zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x於1345年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾梅爾時，她的父親Sir John de Beckering II38歲，母親Millicent la Zouche26歲。她於1380年與Wiliam Mainwaring Mering在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年9月16日在她的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x于1345年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾梅爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Beckering II38岁，母亲Millicent la Zouche26岁。她于1380年与Wiliam Mainwaring Mering在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年9月16日在她的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Millicent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Melisende, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from amal ‘labour’ + swinth ‘strength’. This was the name of a daughter of Charlemagne. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x was born in 1345, in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir John de Beckering II, was 38 and her mother, Millicent la Zouche, was 26. She married Wiliam Mainwaring Mering in 1380, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 16 September 1419, in her hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x est née en 1345, à Meering, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Beckering II, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Millicent la Zouche, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Wiliam Mainwaring Mering en 1380, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 septembre 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x 1345 in Meering, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Beckering II 38 und ihre Mutter Millicent la Zouche 26. Sie hat 1380 in England, United Kingdom Wiliam Mainwaring Mering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. September 1419 im Alter von 74 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x è nata il nel 1345 nel Meering, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Beckering II, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Millicent la Zouche, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Wiliam Mainwaring Mering nel 1380, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1419, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering xが1345年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアメエリングで生まれた時，父Sir John de Beckering IIは38歳，母Millicent la Zoucheは26歳であった。1380年にイギリスイギリスでWiliam Mainwaring Meringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年9月16日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト マークハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x(이)가 1345년 영국 노틴그함실르 메링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Beckering II(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent la Zouche(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Wiliam Mainwaring Mering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 9월 16일 그녀의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 이스트 마카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x nasceu em 1345, em Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Beckering II, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Millicent la Zouche, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Wiliam Mainwaring Mering em 1380, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1419, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x родилась в 1345 г. в местности миринг, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Beckering II было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent la Zouche, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wiliam Mainwaring Mering в 1380 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 сентября 1419 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст мархам, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Millicent Beckering x nació en 1345, en Meering, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Beckering II, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Millicent la Zouche, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Wiliam Mainwaring Mering en 1380, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1419, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
